name: @byok/example-packaging
description: M3-K packageability guarantee smoke: a trivial launcher that forces a single-file bundler (bun build --compile / Node SEA) to pull in @byok/client's daemon + adapter-resolution code paths, then exercises pi's import.meta.resolve degrade path at runtime with zero network I/O. See templates/packaging/{bun,sea} for the recipes that compile launcher.ts into a single executable, and .github/workflows/ci.yml for the automated smoke.
